billing.title:
💎 Plans and subscription

• Plus — 50⭐/mo: more text, files, chat history
• Pro — 100⭐/mo: 2-stage pipeline, search, paid providers
• Max — 250⭐/mo: 3-stage pipeline, coursework, everything

admin.withdraw_info:
💰 Telegram Stars withdrawal

Direct withdrawal of Stars via the Bot API is not supported by Telegram. Stars are converted to TON and paid out via @BotFather → Manage Bots → your bot → Bot Settings → Payments → Stars Balance, or via https://fragment.com (Stars section).

What you can do right now:
• Open @BotFather and check your bot's Stars balance.
• Request a payout there (Telegram rate-limits payouts to once per N days).
• Track incoming payments via the 'Payments' admin section.

The bot cannot withdraw Stars by itself — this is a Telegram-side restriction.
